name: Peanut Butter Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Peanut butter, crunchy or smooth
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Stir the flour, baking powder, and salt together.
2. Mix the oil and peanut butter in a separate bowl, then cut into the flour mixture with a fork or pastry blender until the mixture becomes grainy.
3. Mix the soymilk and molasses in another bowl, then add to the batter. Stir just enough to mix well; do not beat.
4. Fill the lightly oiled muffin tins or muffin cups two-thirds full. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes.
Variation: For Peanut Butter Bran Muffins, substitute one cup of bran for one cup of flour.
